originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Debugging Variational Advantage Function for Credit Assignment in RL
summary: Worked on a new variational advantage function to replace generalized advantage estimation (GAE). The function predicts values and standard deviations over a horizon and aims to learn a discount factor from uncertainty. Debugged the advantage computation in a CUDA kernel and resolved theoretical issues with value function training.
